metadata.name: Receive a Return Without an RMA

description: A customer sends back a return without first getting a Return Merchandise Authorization (RMA). The returns department must handle this exception.

nodes.task_description: The returns department receives a package with no RMA number.

expected_outcome.value: The package is identified as an exception.

nodes.task_description: The operator opens the package and uses the packing slip or item inside to identify the original sales order.

expected_outcome.value: The operator successfully finds the original order in the system.

nodes.task_description: The operator creates a new RMA for the order retrospectively.

expected_outcome.value: An RMA is created so the return can be processed correctly.

nodes.task_description: The operator proceeds with the standard inspection and disposition process using the newly created RMA.

expected_outcome.value: The exception is resolved, and the return is processed normally.
